_meta.description: Living registry of free/low-cost API resources. Updated by Eos.

github_models.name: GitHub Models API
github_models.rate_limit: ~150 req/day high-end, more for smaller models
github_models.notes: No credit card required. Best free LLM access for automated research.

google_gemini.name: Google AI Studio / Gemini API
google_gemini.free_tier_details: Flash: 1500 req/day, 1M TPM. Pro: 50 req/day, 32K TPM
google_gemini.models_available: Gemini 2.0 Flash, Gemini 1.5 Pro, Gemini 1.5 Flash
google_gemini.notes: Extremely generous free tier. 1500 req/day of Flash is massive for automated tasks.

groq.name: Groq API
groq.free_tier_details: VERIFIED: llama-3.1-8b-instant: 30 RPM, 14.4K RPD, 6K TPM, 500K TPD. llama-3.3-70b-versatile: 30 RPM, 1K RPD, 12K TPM, 100K TPD. qwen3-32b: 60 RPM, 1K RPD, 6K TPM, 500K TPD. Cached tokens don't count.
groq.rate_limit_75pct: llama-3.1-8b: 22 RPM, 10.8K RPD. llama-3.3-70b: 22 RPM, 750 RPD. qwen3-32b: 45 RPM, 750 RPD
groq.notes: VERIFIED 2026-03-22. Cached tokens free. Llama 4 Scout also available (30 RPM, 1K RPD). Limits are per-org not per-user.

cerebras.name: Cerebras Inference API
cerebras.free_tier_details: VERIFIED: llama3.1-8b: 30 RPM, 900 RPH, 14.4K RPD, 60K TPM, 1M TPD, ctx=8192. qwen-3-235b-a22b: 30 RPM, 900 RPH, 14.4K RPD, 30K TPM, 1M TPD, ctx=65536. Sub-minute enforcement (e.g. 1 req/2sec).
cerebras.rate_limit_75pct: llama3.1-8b: 22 RPM, 10.8K RPD. qwen-3-235b: 22 RPM, 10.8K RPD, 22K TPM
cerebras.notes: VERIFIED 2026-03-22 from dashboard. Qwen 3-235B FREE is extraordinary — largest free model in our registry. 65K context. Sub-minute rate limiting enforced (1 req/2sec). Pay-as-you-go optional for higher limits.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.free_tier_details: Several $0/token models: Llama 3 8B, Mistral 7B, Gemma, Qwen variants
openrouter.rate_limit: ~20 RPM, ~200 req/day free. Higher with $5+ credits
openrouter.notes: Aggregator. Good fallback when primary APIs are rate-limited.

tavily.name: Tavily Search API
tavily.notes: Purpose-built for AI agents. Returns parsed content, not just links. $100/mo for 10K calls.

serper_dev.name: Serper.dev
serper_dev.budget_strategy: ONE-TIME: 2500 total lifetime free. Use ~3/hr max. Prioritize for searches Tavily can't do.
serper_dev.notes: VERIFIED 2026-03-22. No credit card required. 2500 is lifetime free budget, not monthly.

arxiv_api.name: arXiv API
arxiv_api.notes: Fully open. Returns Atom XML. Core source for ML/AI papers.

semantic_scholar.name: Semantic Scholar API
semantic_scholar.auth: optional API key for higher limits
semantic_scholar.free_tier_details: 100 req/5min unauthenticated. With free key: 1 req/sec (~86K/day)
semantic_scholar.notes: AI-generated TLDRs and citation graphs are uniquely valuable. Free API key available.

openalex.name: OpenAlex API
openalex.notes: Most comprehensive free academic API. Outstanding for broad literature scanning.

huggingface_inference.name: HuggingFace Inference API
huggingface_inference.free_tier_details: ~1000 req/day, varies by model. HF Pro $9/mo for more
huggingface_inference.rate_limit: varies by model popularity and load
huggingface_inference.notes: Access to thousands of open models without local GPU.

google_custom_search.name: Google Custom Search API
google_custom_search.notes: 100 free/day. $5 per 1000 after. Requires Programmable Search Engine setup.

crossref.name: CrossRef API
crossref.notes: Fully open. Fast. Best for formal publication metadata.

sambanova.name: SambaNova Cloud
sambanova.free_tier_details: Free Llama models with fast inference
sambanova.notes: Another fast-inference provider with free Llama access.

together_ai.name: Together.ai
together_ai.notes: Llama 3 8B at ~$0.20/M tokens. Very cheap after free credit.

qwen_coder_3b.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-3B-Instruct
qwen_coder_3b.notes: Comfortable on 16GB. Good for local code analysis.

qwen_coder_7b.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct
qwen_coder_7b.notes: Tight at fp16 on 16GB but works. Quantized fits easily.

deepseek_coder_6_7b.name: DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B
deepseek_coder_6_7b.notes: Alternative code model. Good benchmark against Qwen Coder.
